data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: The time it takes for a user to make a decision increases with the number and complexity of choices.
data.technical_spec: Simple UI design, streamlined navigation, autocomplete features.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Users expect your site to work similarly to others they already know.
data.technical_spec: Consistent layout, familiar interface patterns, intuitive icons.

data.title: Fitt's Law
data.description: The time to acquire a target is a function of the distance to and size of the target.
data.technical_spec: Responsive design elements, accessible interaction points.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: The average person can only keep 7 (plus or minus 2) items in their working memory.
data.technical_spec: Chunking information, prioritizing essential content, simplifying choices.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Users often perceive aesthetically pleasing designs as more usable.
data.technical_spec: Clean design, consistent color palettes, whitespace management.
